---
pagetitle: "Insights"
---

```{=html}
<nav class="nav">
  <div class="nav-inner">
    <a href="index.html" class="brand">EJ.</a>
    <ul class="nav-links">
      <li><a href="about.html">About</a></li>
      <li><a href="experience.html">Experience</a></li>
      <li><a href="projects.html">Projects</a></li>
      <li><a href="hobbies.html">Hobbies</a></li>
      <li><a href="insights.html" class="active">Insights</a></li>
    </ul>
    <a href="contact.html" class="btn-dark">Get in touch</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<main>
<div class="page reveal">
  <div class="eyebrow page-eyebrow">Insights</div>
  <h1 class="page-title">Notes, essays, and lessons.</h1>
  <p class="page-intro">
    Short writing on analytics, AI, and the messy middle of turning data into decisions.
  </p>

  <div class="insight-list">
    <div class="insight-item">
      <div class="insight-tag">Coming soon</div>
      <div class="insight-title">Notes on analytics, AI, and a career in tech</div>
      <div class="insight-desc">
        Reflections on what I'm learning at UCSD, the tools I'm picking up, and how I think about
        framing data problems in the real world.
      </div>
      <a href="#" class="arrow-link">Read →</a>
    </div>
    <div class="insight-item">
      <div class="insight-tag">Coming soon</div>
      <div class="insight-title">Building trustworthy reporting</div>
      <div class="insight-desc">
        Lessons from standardizing dashboards and reconciling data at Morningstar — what makes a
        metric worth trusting.
      </div>
      <a href="#" class="arrow-link">Read →</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</main>

<footer class="site-footer">
  <div class="footer-inner">
    <span>Based in San Diego, CA · UCSD MS Business Analytics</span>
    <div class="footer-links">
      <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/eesha-jagdhane" target="_blank" rel="noopener">LinkedIn</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/eeshajagdhane?tab=repositories" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GitHub</a>
      <a href="mailto:ejagdhane99@gmail.com">Email</a>
      <a href="resume.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Resume</a>
    </div>
    <span>© 2026 Eesha Jagdhane</span>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
  const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('visible'); });
  }, { threshold: 0.08 });
  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => io.observe(el));
</script>
```
